title: Department Manager Vacancy at MTR Foods Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MTR Foods Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MTR Foods Capital India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
